name: AroCell AB (publ)
summary: AroCell AB (publ), a vitro diagnostics company, focuses on the monitoring of hematological malignancies, breast cancer, and other solid tumors. The company offers TK 210 ELISA, a kit for the determination of Thymidine Kinase 1 in human blood. The company was formerly known as Xi Bao Research AB and changed its name to AroCell AB (publ) in 2006. AroCell AB (publ) was founded in 2003 and is based in Uppsala, Sweden.
